distinctive_elements: Second Toaplan game to use FM synthesis
influences: Progressive rock (Yes - Going for the One album inspired game's Japanese title)

extraction_notes: T3 tier data - empirical/qualitative. Wikipedia source provided composer names, sound chip specifications (Yamaha YM3812 at 3.5 MHz), and general production approach (FM synthesis + guitar), but no specific track data, tempo, keys, chord progressions, or SFX characteristics were documented. Genesis port details not specified in available source.
